'''âzh-th-l-f''' ('''kazhathlefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quakeproof|quakeproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-l-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quakeproof|quakeproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-th-l-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazhathlefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhathlefoko|thizhathlefoko]] || [[word:jizhathlefoko|jizhathlefoko]] || [[word:shizhathlefoko|shizhathlefoko]] || [[word:kizhathlefoko|kizhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhathlefoko|thuthuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:jujuzhathlefoko|jujuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:shushuzhathlefoko|shushuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:kukuzhathlefoko|kukuzhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhathlefoko|thuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:juzhathlefoko|juzhathlefoko]] || [[word:shuzhathlefoko|shuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:kuzhathlefoko|kuzhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhathlefoko|thuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:juzhathlefoko|juzhathlefoko]] || [[word:shuzhathlefoko|shuzhathlefoko]] || [[word:kuzhathlefoko|kuzhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhathlefoko|thezhathlefoko]] || [[word:jezhathlefoko|jezhathlefoko]] || [[word:shezhathlefoko|shezhathlefoko]] || [[word:kezhathlefoko|kezhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhathlefoko|thothozhathlefoko]] || [[word:jojozhathlefoko|jojozhathlefoko]] || [[word:shoshozhathlefoko|shoshozhathlefoko]] || [[word:kokozhathlefoko|kokozhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhathlefoko|thozhathlefoko]] || [[word:jozhathlefoko|jozhathlefoko]] || [[word:shozhathlefoko|shozhathlefoko]] || [[word:kozhathlefoko|kozhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhathlefoko|thozhathlefoko]] || [[word:jozhathlefoko|jozhathlefoko]] || [[word:shozhathlefoko|shozhathlefoko]] || [[word:kozhathlefoko|kozhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhathlefoko|thĂŠzhathlefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhathlefoko|jĂŠzhathlefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhathlefoko|shĂŠzhathlefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhathlefoko|kĂŠzhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhathlefoko|thathazhathlefoko]] || [[word:jajazhathlefoko|jajazhathlefoko]] || [[word:shashazhathlefoko|shashazhathlefoko]] || [[word:kakazhathlefoko|kakazhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhathlefoko|thazhathlefoko]] || [[word:jazhathlefoko|jazhathlefoko]] || [[word:shazhathlefoko|shazhathlefoko]] || [[word:kazhathlefoko|kazhathlefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhathlefoko|thazhathlefoko]] || [[word:jazhathlefoko|jazhathlefoko]] || [[word:shazhathlefoko|shazhathlefoko]] || [[word:kazhathlefoko|kazhathlefoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazhathlefithi|shazhathlefithi]] || [[word:shazhathlefiji|shazhathlefiji]] || [[word:shazhathlefishi|shazhathlefishi]] || [[word:shazhathlefiki|shazhathlefiki]]
